description_long: This object is a modern, rectangular computer tower case, primarily constructed from matte black metal and tempered glass. The front panel features a sleek, diagonal accent line, giving it a contemporary and minimalist appearance. The top panel houses several physical buttons and ports, likely for power, reset, and USB connectivity. The rear view reveals a standard arrangement of ventilation grilles, expansion slots, and a pre-installed exhaust fan, typical of PC cases. Both side panels are solid, with one likely being tempered glass for internal component visibility, while the other is opaque metal. The overall design is robust and functional, suitable for housing computer hardware in an urban office, home, or tech workspace.
description: A sleek, black computer tower case with a diagonal accent on the front, ventilation and ports on the rear, and a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing a solid black panel with a diagonal accent line and no visible openings.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a flat, opaque black panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing ventilation grilles, expansion slots, a fan, and standard I/O cutouts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a solid, likely tempered glass or metal panel, flush with the rest of the case.
